Objective Stack Requirements Deliverables Resources →
Internship Assignment

Frontend Development Task

Build a dynamic document page using modern tooling

Handlebars Vite CSS3 JSON
🎯

Objective

Recreate a professional internship task document webpage using Handlebars as the templating engine and Vite as the bundler. The goal is to demonstrate your ability to work with modern frontend tooling, dynamic data binding, and clean UI design — all within a structured project setup.

⚙️

Tech Stack

🖋

Handlebars

Semantic templating engine with partials, helpers, and dynamic data binding from JSON.

⚡

Vite

Lightning-fast build tool with HMR dev server and optimized production builds.

🎨

CSS3

Custom properties, grid/flexbox layout, responsive breakpoints, and smooth transitions.

📦

Node.js

Runtime environment powering the build pipeline, package management, and scripts.

📋

Requirements

  • ✓ Use Handlebars (.hbs) templates — no plain HTML-only approach
  • ✓ Load all content dynamically from content.json
  • ✓ Implement reusable Handlebars partials for header and footer
  • ✓ Configure Vite to process and compile Handlebars templates
  • ✓ Output final built HTML into the /dist directory
  • ✓ Enable hot-reload dev server via npm run dev
  • ✓ Include at least: Title, Sections, Bullet points, and Links
  • ✓ Create a clean, modern, fully responsive UI
  • ✓ Add hover effects on all interactive elements
  • ✓ Include meta tags and a favicon
📦

Deliverables

  1. Complete project source code with the specified folder structure
  2. Fully configured vite.config.js with Handlebars plugin
  3. Working src/templates/index.hbs using dynamic placeholders
  4. At least two Handlebars partials (header and footer)
  5. Populated src/data/content.json with all page content
  6. Polished src/assets/css/style.css with responsive design
  7. A comprehensive README.md with setup instructions
🗂️

Folder Structure

📁 project-root/
📁 src/
📁 templates/
📄 index.hbs
📁 partials/
📄 header.hbs
📄 footer.hbs
📁 assets/
📄 css/style.css
📄 js/main.js
📄 images/favicon.svg
📄 data/content.json
📁 dist/
📄 package.json
📄 vite.config.js
📄 README.md
🔗

Useful Links

Official guide covering expressions, partials, helpers, and built-in blocks.
→
Vite Official Docs
Configuration, plugins, build options, and the complete Vite API reference.
→
vite-plugin-handlebars
The plugin that bridges Vite's build pipeline with Handlebars template processing.
→
MDN CSS Reference
Complete reference for CSS properties, selectors, and modern layout techniques.
→

This document is part of a frontend internship evaluation.
